home.heroTitle: Check links before you trust them
home.heroSubtitle: LinkGuard runs automated signals and threat intelligence to produce a risk score — with clear explanations and next steps.
home.step1: Normalize the URL and read its structure.
home.step2: Run technical heuristics (TLS, host shape, entropy, typosquatting hints).
home.step3: Query Google Safe Browsing when configured.
home.step4: Combine signals into a weighted score with plain-language guidance.
home.rateHint: Guests: 3 scans per UTC day per network. Sign in to keep scan history.
result.title: Scan result
result.missing: No scan loaded. Go back and analyze a URL.
signal.parse.desc: Whether the URL is well-formed and readable
signal.ip_host.desc: Whether the link uses a raw IP instead of a domain name
signal.shortener.desc: Whether the destination is hidden behind a redirect service
signal.typosquatting.desc: Whether the domain resembles a well-known brand with slight misspellings
signal.entropy.desc: Whether the URL path looks randomly generated (common in phishing)
signal.domain_age.desc: Whether the domain was registered recently (new domains are riskier)
signal.safe_browsing.desc: Whether Google has flagged this URL as malicious
result.signInToSave: Sign in to save favorites and history.
result.rateLimited: Guest limit reached. Sign in to continue.
auth.clerkMissing: Add VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY to client/.env to enable authentication.
dashboard.title: Your scans
dashboard.empty: No scans yet. Run your first check from Home.
admin.title: Administration
admin.empty: No users returned from Clerk yet.
admin.inviteSent: Invitation sent. Check the inbox (and Clerk Dashboard if needed).
admin.forbidden: You need admin access (Clerk public metadata role) to use this page.
admin.deleteConfirm: Remove this user from Clerk? This cannot be undone.
explanation.insufficient_data.main: Some important signals were missing or inconclusive, so confidence is limited.
explanation.dangerous.main: Multiple indicators suggest this URL is high risk.
explanation.suspicious.main: Some signals look off or resemble tactics used in phishing.
explanation.safe.main: No strong risk indicators were found based on the automated checks that ran.
explanation.safe.caveat: That does not guarantee the link is harmless — always stay cautious with unexpected links.
action.insufficient_data.retry: Try again later, or sign in if the service was temporarily rate-limited.
action.insufficient_data.avoid: Avoid entering credentials or downloading files from this link until you have stronger confirmation.
action.dangerous.stop: Do not enter credentials, do not download files, and close the page if you already opened it.
action.dangerous.report: Report the message or site that shared the link if it was unexpected.
action.suspicious.verify: Verify the sender through a second channel before taking any action.
action.suspicious.navigate: Prefer navigating to the service by typing its known domain manually.
explanation.low_risk.main: This link appears mostly safe, but stay alert.
explanation.low_risk.caveat: No major red flags detected, though this doesn't guarantee the link is completely harmless.
action.low_risk.verify: If the link was unsolicited, verify through another channel before logging in or paying.
action.low_risk.updates: Keep your device and browser updated for defense in depth.
action.safe.verify: If the link was unsolicited, verify through another channel before logging in or paying.
action.safe.updates: Keep device and browser updates enabled for defense in depth.
footer.note: LinkGuard never claims a link is 100% safe.
